hyperedges.label: Full Migration Pipeline: PDF Cache → Parse (LLM/Heuristic) → Airtable Post
Order Generation Flow: Resolve Meals → Enforce Min Qty → Write to Airtable → Format Email
Student Interaction Loop: QR Scan → Webapp → Select Meal + Rate → Informs Next Order
Catering Pipeline: Student Selection → Order Engine → Caterer Email
Caterer Data Flow: PDF → Cache → Airtable
Order Validation: Dietary + Min Qty + Fallback Logic

hyperedges.label: Full Migration Pipeline: PDF Cache → Parse (LLM/Heuristic) → Airtable Post
Order Generation Flow: Resolve Meals → Enforce Min Qty → Write to Airtable → Format Email
Student Interaction Loop: QR Scan → Webapp → Select Meal + Rate → Informs Next Order
Catering Pipeline: Student Selection → Order Engine → Caterer Email
Caterer Data Flow: PDF → Cache → Airtable
Order Validation: Dietary + Min Qty + Fallback Logic
